deck:
* Phase-Shifted Full Bridge (PSFB) — generated by OpenMagnetics
* Vin=48V, Vo=12V, Fs=100kHz, Deff=0.7, outputs=1
* n=2.45, Lr=2uH, Lm=1009.92uH, Lo=62.7177uH, rect=2

.model DIDEAL D(IS=1e-12 RS=0.005 CJO=1n)
.model SW1 SW VT=2.5 VH=0.8 RON=0.01 ROFF=1e+06

Vdc vin_dc 0 48

Vpwm_QA pwm_QA 0 PULSE(0 5 0 2.000000e-07 2.000000e-07 4.600000e-06 1.000000e-05)
Vpwm_QB pwm_QB 0 PULSE(0 5 5.000000e-06 2.000000e-07 2.000000e-07 4.600000e-06 1.000000e-05)
Vq1_sense vin_dc qa_drain 0
SQA qa_drain mid_A pwm_QA 0 SW1
SQB mid_A 0 pwm_QB 0 SW1
Vleg_C mid_C 0 PULSE(0 48.000000 3.500000e-06 2.000000e-07 2.000000e-07 4.600000e-06 1.000000e-05)

Vpri_sense mid_A pri_lr 0
Evab vab 0 mid_A mid_C 1

L_series pri_lr trafo_pri 2.000000e-06

L_pri trafo_pri mid_C 1.009916e-03
L_sec_o1 sec_a_o1 sec_b_o1 1.682492e-04
K1 L_pri L_sec_o1 9.999000e-01

Evpri_w vpri_w 0 trafo_pri mid_C 1
Evsec_w_o1 vsec_w_o1 0 sec_a_o1 sec_b_o1 1

Vsec1_sense_o1 sec_a_o1 rec_a_o1 0
Vsec2_sense_o1 sec_b_o1 rec_b_o1 0
D_r1_o1 rec_a_o1 out_rect_o1 DIDEAL
D_r2_o1 rec_b_o1 out_rect_o1 DIDEAL
D_r3_o1 out_gnd_o1 rec_a_o1 DIDEAL
D_r4_o1 out_gnd_o1 rec_b_o1 DIDEAL
L_out_o1 out_rect_o1 out_node_o1 6.271766e-05
C_out_o1 out_node_o1 out_gnd_o1 1.000000e-04
R_load_o1 out_node_o1 out_gnd_o1 6.000000
Vout_sense_o1 out_gnd_o1 0 0

.tran 5.000000e-08 2.401000e-02 2.400000e-02

.save v(vab) v(mid_A) v(mid_C) v(vin_dc) v(vpri_w) i(Vpri_sense) i(Vdc) i(Vq1_sense) v(out_node_o1) v(vsec_w_o1) i(Vsec1_sense_o1) i(Vsec2_sense_o1) i(Vout_sense_o1)

.options RELTOL=1.000000e-02 ABSTOL=1.000000e-07 VNTOL=1.000000e-04 ITL1=500 ITL4=500
.options METHOD=GEAR TRTOL=7.000000e+00
.ic v(out_node_o1)=1.200000e+01

.end
